name: Corn Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sour cream, mayonnaise, sugar, white vinegar, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
2. Stir well until all ingredients are mixed thoroughly.
3. Add the corn, carrots, green pepper, and onion to the bowl.
4. Gently toss the vegetables so they are evenly coated with the dressing.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to develop.
6. When ready to serve, use a slotted spoon to transfer the slaw to serving dishes.
